amendments.name: Automated Market Maker
amendments.description: Native automated market maker functionality for XRPL. Enables liquidity pools and continuous trading without order books.

amendments.name: Batch Transactions
amendments.description: Submit multiple transactions atomically in a single batch. Reduces fees and improves throughput.

amendments.name: Decentralized Identity
amendments.description: W3C-compliant Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs) on XRPL. Self-sovereign identity management.

amendments.name: Non-Fungible Tokens
amendments.description: Native NFT support on XRPL with minting, burning, and trading capabilities. No smart contracts needed.

amendments.name: Clawback
amendments.description: Allow issuers to clawback tokens from user accounts. Required for regulatory compliance and asset recovery.

amendments.name: Lending Protocol
amendments.description: Native lending and borrowing on XRPL. Collateralized loans with automatic liquidations.

amendments.name: Multi-Purpose Tokens
amendments.description: Hybrid tokens with both fungible and non-fungible characteristics. Advanced tokenization use cases.

amendments.name: Price Oracle
amendments.description: On-chain price feeds for assets. Multi-sig validator price aggregation for DeFi applications.

amendments.name: Credentials
amendments.description: Verifiable credentials on XRPL. Standardized attestation framework for identity and compliance.

amendments.name: Smart Escrow
amendments.description: Conditional escrows with time-based and oracle-based release triggers. Programmable escrow logic.

amendments.name: CheckCashMakesTrustLine
amendments.description: Automatically create trust lines when cashing checks. Improves UX for token payments.

amendments.name: fixNFTokenRemint
amendments.description: Fix for NFT reminting vulnerability. Prevents unauthorized re-minting of burned NFTs.

amendments.name: fixUnburnableNFToken
amendments.description: Fix for unburnable NFT edge cases. Ensures proper handling of non-transferable tokens.

amendments.name: Negative UNL
amendments.description: Improved validator liveness tracking. Allows network to continue with offline validators.

amendments.name: TickSize
amendments.description: Minimum price increment for order book entries. Reduces order book spam and storage.

amendments.name: fix1578
amendments.description: Escrow fix for finish time calculation. Ensures correct release timing.

amendments.name: fix1543
amendments.description: Offer processing fix. Corrects edge cases in DEX offer matching.

amendments.name: DepositPreauth
amendments.description: Pre-authorization for deposits. Required for regulatory compliance in certain jurisdictions.

amendments.name: fix1368
amendments.description: Escrow overspend fix. Prevents spending more than escrowed amount.

amendments.name: fix1515
amendments.description: Offer cancel fix. Corrects offer cancellation edge cases.

_meta.note: This is a manually maintained mapping of XRPL amendments for classification purposes
